mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.project_id, t.task_id, t.agent_company_id, t.agent_engineer_id, t.task_scope, t.deadline, t.status, t.submit_count, t.confirmed_by, t.confirmed_time, t.reject_reason, t.version, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, p.project_name, pt.task_name, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, ae.name AS agent_engineer_name FROM outsource_task t LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = t.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_engineer ae ON ae.id = t.agent_engineer_id AND ae.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.agent_company_id = #{agentCompanyId} AND t.status = #{status} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, agent_company_id, message_type, business_id, project_id, title, content, is_read, create_time FROM agent_message WHERE agent_company_id = #{agentCompanyId} ORDER BY is_read ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_message WHERE agent_company_id = #{agentCompanyId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE agent_company_id = #{agentCompanyId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_message (id, agent_company_id, message_type, business_id, project_id, title, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{agentCompanyId}, #{messageType}, #{businessId}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
